mapper.sql: comment_id, note_id, note_author_id, user_id, root_id, parent_comment_id, reply_to_user_id, level, comment_status, like_count_snapshot, reply_count_snapshot, hot_score_snapshot, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM bluenote_comment.content_comment WHERE comment_id IN
#{commentId}

SELECT FROM bluenote_comment.content_comment WHERE level = 1 AND comment_status = 'VISIBLE' AND comment_id IN
#{commentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bluenote_comment.content_comment WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND comment_status = 'VISIBLE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bluenote_comment.content_comment WHERE root_id = #{rootId} AND comment_status = 'VISIBLE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bluenote_comment.content_comment WHERE root_id = #{rootId} AND level = 2 AND comment_status = 'VISIBLE'
SELECT FROM bluenote_comment.content_comment WHERE note_id = #{noteId} AND level = 1 AND comment_status = 'VISIBLE' ORDER BY hot_score_snapshot DESC, created_at DESC, comment_id DESC LIMIT #{size}
